methods.description: Process for selecting sampling sites based on their position in the catchment to ensure representation of all anthropogenic effects in the catchment basin.

steps.description: The sampling sites were selected according to their position in the catchment.
steps.searchable_summary: select sampling sites based on catchment position

steps.description: We regarded a site as ideal if it was located at the end of a downstream section within the catchment basin.
steps.searchable_summary: identify ideal sites at downstream section ends

steps.description: The initial database contained data from different projects: (i) the Ecosurv project (226 stream sites); and (ii) research projects undertaken by the University of Pannonia (46 stream sites in 2004 and 64 in 2010).
steps.searchable_summary: compile initial database from Ecosurv and University of Pannonia projects

steps.description: In the database of 334 stream sites, a total of 75 sites met the criterion detailed above, and were therefore eligible for our further analyses.
steps.searchable_summary: filter database to find eligible sites
